name: Matt
text: Hi! Recycling is one of the easiest ways we can reduce pollution in our daily lives.

name: Matt
text: When waste is sorted correctly, materials like paper, glass, and metal can be reused again.

name: Matt
text: This helps save energy and reduces the amount of raw resources taken from nature.

name: Matt
text: It also keeps huge amounts of garbage out of landfills, where it can harm the environment.

name: Matt
text: Even small actions, like recycling a bottle or a can, can make a real difference over time.

name: Matt
text: The more people recycle, the cleaner and healthier our communities can become.

name: Matt
text: Protecting the planet starts with simple habits, and recycling is one of the most important.
